summary: Session 2 of 2 (UAT, screenshot, and release): authored the per-set UAT checklist to the Set 078/079 bar (3 walks / 5 items; every literal string re-grounded against current gettingStartedHtml.js/tree.css with a programmatic 10/10 string-match sweep; every cited Layer-2 suite re-run fresh during authoring - Set 080 S1 6/6, Set 079 S1 20/20, verification-mode block 5/5, restoreGsState 26/26; ad-hoc floor validated: 3 functional items with ProgrammaticVerification, 2 judgment items flagged IsJudgmentItem). Operator walked it against a locally built VSIX: all items PASS including both legibility judgment items (the set's declared gate); Walk 1's functional checkbox was initially saved unchecked by oversight and attested PASS via chat, recorded with a resolution note in the checklist per the Set 079 precedent. Operator captured the refreshed getting-started.png (the old capture predated the provider-access group). Release: package.json 0.35.0 -> 0.36.0 (extension-only; ai_router untouched, router stays 0.28.0), CHANGELOG 0.36.0 entry, repository-reference release-status row + version-walk entry, Test workflow green (run 28760252001, all OS jobs incl. Windows Playwright Layer 3), operator-authorized vsix-v0.36.0 tag pushed (tagged commit 2efaa92) triggering the Marketplace publish workflow. Operator UAT feedback spawned follow-up Set 081 (scope/condition the Full-tier verification-budget input to the Direct provider API keys sub-choice).
verification_notes: Routed gate: REQUIRED (exit 0) over the session's 8-file diff - triggers blast-radius, multi-module {docs, tools}, breadth, and build-ci-config (package.json), exactly as predicted at S1 close. Cross-provider verification ran on gpt-5-4 (openai; orchestrator is claude/anthropic). Round 1 returned one finding with no severity label (S080-S2-V1-001: the repository-reference 0.36.0 row claimed 'UAT walked and attested' while the checklist still recorded Walk 1's functional item false/pending) - treated as blocking per the L-071-1 anti-laundering rule, remediated by rewriting the row to the actual walk state, echoes swept per L-065-1 (CHANGELOG and version-walk claims were already scoped to the judgment items), structured finding persisted to s2-issues.json with resolution annotations. Round 2 (narrow re-verify of the specific fix, same tier, no max_tier pin per L-064-7) returned VERIFIED. Raw outputs: s2-verification.md, s2-verification-round-2.md (never edited). The Walk 1 checkbox itself was subsequently attested PASS by the operator via chat and the repository-reference row updated to the clean-attestation wording with the issueId cross-referenced.
